channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news aggregator covering US-Iran conflict, Ukraine war, and global security

item.title: 🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israel expands Lebanon offensive, takes control of Beaufort Ridge
item.description: The IDF launched an operation in Beaufort Ridge and Wadi al-Saluki to remove Hezbollah terrorist infrastructure, marking a significant expansion of Israel's Lebanon operations.

item.title: 🇳🇿🇺🇸 New Zealand Defense Minister pushes back on US criticism of military spending
item.description: Defense Minister Chris Penk defended New Zealand's military spending levels after US Secretary of War Pete Hegseth called the country a "freeloader" at the Shangri-La Dialogue in Singapore.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan rejects accusations of "new militarism" at Shangri-La Dialogue
item.description: Japanese Defense Minister Shinjiro Koizumi denied accusations of renewed militarism during his speech at Asia's premier defense forum, emphasizing Japan's defensive posture.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇵🇭 US plans Coast Guard cutter transfer to Philippines amid South China Sea tensions
item.description: The United States announced plans to transfer a Coast Guard cutter to the Philippines to strengthen Manila's maritime security capabilities in the contested South China Sea.

item.title: 🇲🇾🇳🇴 Malaysia questions Norway's apology over cancelled missile deal
item.description: Malaysian officials say Norway's apology for unilaterally cancelling the Naval Strike Missile export license has raised more questions, casting doubt on the future of the defense procurement.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Factory Activity Stalls in May as Demand Weakens
item.description: Chinas manufacturing sector showed signs of strain in May as factory activity flatlined, with new export orders contracting and input costs rising, raising concerns about the worlds second-largest economy.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israeli Forces Capture Strategic Castle in Southern Lebanon
item.description: Israeli troops seized a Crusader-era mountain castle in southern Lebanon, marking their deepest incursion into the country in over 26 years amid ongoing cross-border tensions.

item.title: 🌏🛡️ US Allies Call for Unity at Singapore Defense Summit
item.description: American allies emphasized the need for global cooperation to address cross-regional security threats, even as the Trump administration criticizes traditional partners over burden-sharing.

item.title: 🇨🇩⚠️ WHO Chief Visits Epicenter of Ebola Outbreak in DR Congo
item.description: The WHO Director-General toured the heart of the Democratic Republic of Congos Ebola outbreak, warning that the spread is outpacing the global response and calling for more international funding.

item.title: 🇵🇭🇨🇳 Philippines Defense Chief Warns China Threat Persists Despite US-China Thaw
item.description: Manilas defense minister said the Philippines remains under severe threat from China despite the recent Trump-Xi summit that eased tensions between Washington and Beijing.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Planning Accelerated Troop Withdrawal from Europe
item.description: The Pentagon plans to speed up the withdrawal of US troops from European bases and will present proposals to NATO allies next month, according to German media citing an unidentified Pentagon source.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Foreign Minister to Visit China and India Amid Global Crises
item.description: British Foreign Minister Yvette Cooper will travel to China on Monday and then to India later in the week. The visits will focus on global issues including the Strait of Hormuz, the Russia-Ukraine war, and the Ebola outbreak.

item.title: 🇦🇹 Austrian Protesters Block Key Alpine Motorway Connecting Germany and Italy
item.description: Thousands of local residents shut down the Brenner motorway, a vital north-south corridor through the Alps, in protest against trucks and tourists clogging their roads.

item.title: 🇫🇷 SoftBank to Invest €45 Billion in AI Data Centers in France
item.description: Japan's SoftBank Group announced plans to invest €45 billion over five years to build artificial intelligence infrastructure in France, marking a major expansion of AI computing capacity in Europe.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Claims It Shot Down US Military Drone Over Territorial Waters
item.description: Iranian military says it detected and destroyed an MQ-1 Predator UAV after it entered Iranian airspace on a hostile mission, escalating tensions as nuclear deal negotiations continue.

item.title: 🇸🇾 Euphrates Flooding Displaces Thousands in Eastern Syria
item.description: Syrian authorities opened dam spillways for the first time in three decades as rising Euphrates waters forced thousands to flee in Deir Ezzor province.

item.title: 🇦🇺 AUKUS Deal Modified: Australia to Receive Used US Submarines
item.description: Australia, the US and UK agreed to streamline the AUKUS submarine partnership, allowing Australia to receive used US Virginia-class submarines as part of the trilateral defense pact.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Refutes New Militarism Accusations, Criticizes China Military Buildup
item.description: Defense Minister Shinjiro Koizumi pushed back against claims of Japanese militarism while criticizing China for rapidly expanding military capabilities without transparency, underscoring deepening tensions between the two nations.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Military Fires on Blockade Runner Attempting to Reach Iranian Port
item.description: U.S. Central Command disabled a Gambia-flagged vessel with a Hellfire missile after it ignored warnings while attempting to breach the American blockade of Iranian ports, marking an escalation in enforcement of the Strait of Hormuz closure.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Absent from Shangri-La Defense Forum as Delegates Ask Where is China
item.description: Chinese Defense Minister Dong Jun skipped the annual Asian security summit again this year, sending only a low-profile delegation of PLA experts and scholars as Beijing maintains its absence from key regional defense dialogues.

item.title: 🇻🇳 Vietnam Leader Emphasizes Importance of Strong China Ties for Regional Peace
item.description: Vietnam top leader stated that strong relations with China would benefit regional peace and security, while also noting the importance of U.S. ties, as Vietnam navigates its position between the two rival powers.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian Drones Strike Russian Port and Oil Refinery in Overnight Attack
item.description: Ukrainian drone strikes damaged an oil tanker and refinery in Taganrog, and hit an oil depot in Armavir, marking an escalation in Kyiv's campaign against Russian energy infrastructure.

item.title: ☢️ Drone Strike Hits Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Plant, Russia and Ukraine Trade Blame
item.description: Russia's state nuclear agency said a Ukrainian drone struck a turbine hall at the Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant, leaving a hole in the wall. Kyiv denied responsibility.

item.title: ⚔️ Pentagon Chief Warns US Ready to Resume Iran Strikes If Peace Deal Fails
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said the US military is prepared to restart strikes on Iran if negotiations collapse, speaking at the Shangri-La defense forum in Singapore.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Accuses Trump of Stalling Talks With Excessive Demands
item.description: An Iranian official said Trump is making excessive demands that stall peace negotiations, as oil prices dip on reports a deal could be close but remains uncertain.
